meaning: 英文字母表的第十二個字母，大寫為 L
sentences: The teacher wrote a large L on the board and asked the class to repeat its sound. 老師在黑板上寫了一個大寫字母，並請全班重複它的發音。
Her name begins with L, so she decorated the folder with that letter. 她的名字是以那個字母開頭，所以她用它裝飾資料夾。

meaning: 英文字母表的第十二個字母，小寫為 l
sentences: In some handwriting styles, the lowercase l looks almost like the number one. 在某些手寫體裡，小寫字母看起來幾乎像數字 1。
Please use a clear l so nobody confuses it with a capital I. 請把那個小寫字母寫清楚，免得別人把它和大寫 I 搞混。

meaning: 表示驚訝、強調或輕微感嘆的語氣詞
sentences: La, you finished the puzzle much faster than I expected. 哎呀，你完成那個拼圖的速度比我預期快多了。
La, I never thought we would meet again in this little town. 哎呀，我從沒想到我們會在這個小鎮再見面。

meaning: 防禦性營地；以車輛圍成的營寨
sentences: At dusk, the settlers formed a laager before the storm moved over the plain. 黃昏時，拓荒者在暴風雨越過平原前搭起了一個防禦性營地。
The guide explained how the wagons once stood in a laager for protection. 導覽員解釋過去馬車如何圍成營寨來防衛。
The old hunters covered the laang with leaves so animals would not notice it. 老獵人用樹葉把陷阱坑蓋起來，讓動物不會察覺。
We saw a drawing of a laang in a book about traditional hunting methods. 我們在一本介紹傳統狩獵方法的書裡看到落穴陷阱的圖。
The scientist is conducting a secret experiment in the lab. 科學家正在實驗室裡進行一項秘密實驗。
Students must wear safety goggles when working in the chemistry lab. 學生在化學實驗室工作時必須佩戴安全護目鏡。

meaning: 拉班；《聖經》中的人物，利亞與拉結的父親
sentences: In the story, Jacob worked for Laban before marrying Rachel. 在那個故事裡，雅各先為拉班工作，之後才娶了拉結。
The class discussed why Laban plays such an important role in Genesis. 老師帶著全班討論拉班在《創世記》中為何如此重要。

meaning: 拉巴魯姆軍旗的複數；多面基督軍旗
sentences: The museum catalog described two carved labara from a late Roman church. 博物館目錄記載了一座晚期羅馬教堂出土的兩面拉巴魯姆軍旗雕飾。
Historians compared the symbols on the labara to trace changes in imperial art. 歷史學家比較那些軍旗上的符號，以追查帝國藝術的變化。

meaning: 拉巴魯姆軍旗 (羅馬基督教軍旗)
sentences: Emperor Constantine adopted the labarum as his imperial standard. 君士坦丁大帝採用了拉巴魯姆軍旗作為他的帝國標準。
The labarum featured the Chi-Rho symbol representing Christ. 拉巴魯姆軍旗上有代表基督的 Chi-Rho 符號。
At night, the labba moved quietly through the forest undergrowth. 夜裡，那隻大鼠豚安靜地穿過森林下層植被。
The biologist set up a camera to record a labba near the riverbank. 生物學家在河岸旁架起相機，想拍到一隻大鼠豚。
The passing cart labbered muddy water onto the stone wall. 經過的推車把泥水濺到了石牆上。
Do not labber the papers while you are washing the paintbrushes. 你洗畫筆時不要把文件潑濕了。

meaning: l音發音錯誤；l音過度使用
sentences: The speech therapist worked with the child to correct his labdacism. 語言治療師與孩子一起糾正他對 l 音的發音錯誤。
Labdacism is a rare phonological phenomenon in linguistics. l音發音錯誤是語言學中一種罕見的音韻現象。

meaning: l 音發音異常；labdacism 的另一種學術寫法
sentences: One footnote used the older term labdacismus instead of the more familiar spelling. 某條註腳用了較舊的寫法，而不是較常見的拼法。
Students compared labdacismus with other names for speech defects in classical grammar. 學生把這種 l 音發音異常和古典語法中其他言語缺陷名稱拿來比較。

meaning: 岩薔薇樹脂；用於香水的深色芳香油樹脂
sentences: The perfumer added a little labdanum to give the blend a warm, resinous depth. 調香師加了一點岩薔薇樹脂，讓香氣更溫暖而有樹脂感。
Ancient traders valued labdanum for its strong fragrance and sticky texture. 古代商人看重這種樹脂強烈的香氣與黏稠的質地。
Corruption continued to labefact the foundation of the government. 貪腐持續動搖著政府的根基。
His confidence was labefacted by the repeated failures. 他的信心因接連的失敗而動搖了。

meaning: 衰敗；削弱；labefaction 的異體寫法
sentences: The historian described the labefactation of civic order after the revolt. 歷史學家描述了叛亂後公民秩序的衰敗。
Fear and hunger led to the slow labefactation of the settlement. 恐懼與飢餓導致那個聚落逐漸衰弱。
The labefaction of the old regime was evident after the riot. 暴動後，舊政權的衰敗顯而易見。
They feared the moral labefaction of the next generation. 他們擔心下一代的道德淪喪（動搖）。
A long drought can labefy even a well-managed farming town. 長期乾旱甚至會削弱一個管理良好的農業小鎮。
The critic argued that empty slogans only labefy serious debate. 那位評論者認為空洞口號只會削弱嚴肅的討論。
Please read the information on the food label before you buy it. 購買前請閱讀食品標籤上的資訊。
The company is planning to launch a new line under its own label. 公司計劃推出自己品牌（標籤）下的新系列產品。
The factory installed a new labeler to speed up the packaging line. 工廠裝了一台新的貼標機來加快包裝線速度。
She worked as the final labeler before the boxes were shipped out. 在箱子運出前，她負責最後貼上標籤。
Under the microscope, the botanist compared the shape of the labella in several orchid species. 植物學家在顯微鏡下比較了幾種蘭花唇瓣的形狀。
The field notes mentioned unusually bright labella on the mountain orchids. 田野筆記提到那些高山蘭有格外鮮明的唇瓣。
The botanist described the flower as labellate because of its prominent lip-like petal. 植物學家把那朵花描述為具唇瓣的，因為它有顯著的唇狀花瓣。
A labellate structure often makes the orchid easier to identify in the field. 具唇瓣的構造往往讓這種蘭花更容易在野外辨認。
The small shop uses a hand-held labeller for price tags. 那家小店用手持貼標機來貼價格標籤。
When the labeller jammed, the workers had to stop the line for a few minutes. 貼標機卡住時，工人只好讓產線停了幾分鐘。
The insect had a labelloid plate that resembled a tiny orchid lip. 那隻昆蟲有一片似唇瓣的小板狀構造，看起來像微小的蘭花唇瓣。
Researchers noted a labelloid outgrowth near the center of the flower. 研究人員注意到花朵中央附近有一個似唇瓣的突起。

meaning: 唇瓣；蘭花中特化而明顯的花瓣
sentences: The orchid's labellum guided insects toward the flower's center. 那株蘭花的唇瓣把昆蟲引向花朵中央。
She sketched the labellum to show how different it looked from the other petals. 她畫下唇瓣，顯示它和其他花瓣有多麼不同。
The anatomy chart labels the inner and outer labia clearly for students. 那張解剖圖為學生清楚標出了內外陰唇。
Doctors explained how the labia protect the more delicate tissues nearby. 醫師解釋了陰唇如何保護周圍較脆弱的組織。

meaning: 唇的；以雙唇或嘴唇發出的
sentences: The teacher demonstrated how a labial sound uses the lips more than the tongue. 老師示範了唇音如何比舌頭更依賴嘴唇來發音。
In the video, the speaker exaggerated each labial consonant for beginners. 影片裡，講者把每個唇音子音都刻意說得很明顯，方便初學者學習。

meaning: 唇音替代錯誤；以一種唇音代替另一種唇音的語音缺陷
sentences: The speech therapist recognized the child's labialism during the reading exercise. 語言治療師在朗讀練習時察覺到那名孩子的唇音替代問題。
The article distinguishes labialism from other articulation disorders. 那篇文章把這種唇音替代錯誤和其他構音障礙區分開來。

meaning: 唇部過度參與的構音障礙；特別指過度使用雙唇發音
sentences: The clinician described the patient's labialismus as a persistent articulation problem. 臨床醫師把那位病人的這種構音障礙描述成持續性的問題。
Careful training helped reduce the labialismus in several consonant sounds. 細緻的訓練幫助幾個子音的唇部過度發音情況減輕了。
The phonetics lecture focused on the labiality of certain consonants. 那堂語音學課聚焦在某些子音的唇音性。
Researchers measured the labiality of the sound by studying lip movement. 研究人員透過觀察嘴唇動作來測量那個聲音的唇音特徵。

meaning: 唇化；使發音帶有圓唇特徵的過程
sentences: The chart shows when labialization happens during the production of the consonant. 那張圖表顯示了這個子音在什麼時候會出現唇化。
A slight labialization changed the sound enough for the students to notice. 輕微的唇化就讓學生聽出那個聲音有明顯差異。

meaning: 使唇化；使帶有圓唇發音特徵
sentences: Some speakers naturally labialize the consonant before a rounded vowel. 有些說話者在圓唇母音前會自然把那個子音唇化。
The coach asked the actor not to labialize the sound too strongly. 指導老師請那位演員不要把那個聲音唇化得太明顯。

meaning: 以唇音方式；藉由嘴唇地
sentences: The sound is produced labially, so the lips must close at the right moment. 那個聲音是以唇音方式產生的，所以嘴唇必須在正確時刻閉合。
He pronounced the consonant too labially for the target accent. 他把那個子音說得太偏唇音了，不符合目標口音。

meaning: 唇形科；薄荷等植物所屬的一科
sentences: Mint, basil, and sage were once grouped under the family name Labiatae. 薄荷、羅勒和鼠尾草過去都被歸在唇形科這個名稱下。
The field guide still lists Labiatae beside the newer botanical name. 那本野外圖鑑仍在新版植物名稱旁註記這個舊科名。

meaning: 唇形的；花冠或萼片呈上下兩唇狀的
sentences: The botanist pointed out the labiate corolla of the tiny purple flower. 植物學家指出那朵紫色小花具有唇形花冠。
A labiate blossom often helps pollinators land in a predictable way. 唇形花朵往往能讓授粉昆蟲以可預測的方式停落。

meaning: 具唇狀構造的；呈唇形的
sentences: The specimen has a labiated opening that looks like a tiny mouth. 那個標本有一個唇狀開口，看起來像一張小嘴。
Researchers used the term labiated to describe the flower's split tip. 研究人員用這個詞來描述那朵花裂開且呈唇狀的頂端。

meaning: 具鉗狀附屬物的；帶有夾鉗構造的
sentences: The fossil insect showed a labidophorous tail with clear forceps-like appendages. 那個昆蟲化石呈現出具鉗狀附屬物的尾端構造。
Under magnification, the segment looked distinctly labidophorous to the entomologist. 在放大觀察下，那個節段在昆蟲學家眼中明顯帶有鉗狀構造。

meaning: 鉗耳蠼屬；耳夾蟲的一個分類屬
sentences: The specimen was identified as Labidura after the forceps and wing covers were examined. 研究人員檢查尾鉗與翅鞘後，將這個標本鑑定為鉗耳蠼屬。
One famous extinct giant earwig belonged to the genus Labidura. 一種著名的已滅絕巨型耳夾蟲就屬於鉗耳蠼屬。

meaning: 鉗耳蠼科；耳夾蟲的一個科
sentences: Several striped earwigs in the collection belong to the family Labiduridae. 館藏中的幾隻條紋耳夾蟲屬於鉗耳蠼科。
The paper reviews how Labiduridae species are distributed across warm regions. 那篇論文回顧了鉗耳蠼科物種在溫暖地區的分布情形。

meaning: 下咽片；昆蟲口器中的一部分
sentences: The diagram labels the labiella near the center of the insect's mouthparts. 那張圖把下咽片標在昆蟲口器中央附近。
Students compared the labiella of two species under the stereo microscope. 學生在實體顯微鏡下比較了兩種昆蟲的下咽片。

meaning: 不穩定的；容易變化或分解的
sentences: The compound is too labile to remain intact at room temperature. 那個化合物太不穩定，無法在室溫下保持完整。
Her mood seemed labile after several sleepless nights. 幾個失眠夜之後，她的情緒顯得很容易波動。
The thermal lability of the protein made the experiment difficult to repeat. 這種蛋白質的熱不穩定性讓實驗很難重複。
Emotional lability can become obvious when someone is under severe stress. 一個人承受巨大壓力時，情緒易變性可能會變得很明顯。

meaning: 使不穩定的過程；活化為易反應狀態的過程
sentences: The chemist observed rapid labilization after the solution was heated. 化學家觀察到溶液加熱後很快出現不穩定化。
This catalyst promotes the labilization of the metal complex. 這種催化劑會促進金屬錯合物的不穩定化。

meaning: 使不穩定；使變得容易反應
sentences: A small change in pH can labilize the bond and start the reaction. 酸鹼值的一點變化就可能使那個鍵不穩定並啟動反應。
The treatment was designed to labilize the complex before separation. 這項處理是為了在分離前先使該錯合物變得不穩定。

meaning: 唇齒槽的；涉及嘴唇與齒槽脊發音的
sentences: The therapist noted a labioalveolar articulation in the child's distorted consonant. 治療師注意到那名孩子失真的子音帶有唇齒槽發音特徵。
A labioalveolar sound uses the lower lip against the alveolar ridge. 唇齒槽音會用下唇接觸齒槽脊來發音。

meaning: 唇側與牙頸部的；與唇面及牙頸有關的
sentences: The dentist pointed out a shallow labiocervical groove on the front tooth. 牙醫指出那顆前牙有一道淺淺的唇側牙頸溝。
Students traced the labiocervical line while studying tooth morphology. 學生在學習牙齒形態時描畫了唇側牙頸線。

meaning: 唇齒的；用嘴唇與牙齒發出的
sentences: The sounds f and v are labiodental in English. 在英語裡，f 和 v 都是唇齒音。
The teacher showed how the lower lip touches the upper teeth in a labiodental sound. 老師示範唇齒音是如何以下唇碰觸上齒來發出的。

meaning: 唇舌的；與嘴唇和舌頭有關的
sentences: The doctor recorded a labioglossal weakness after the nerve injury. 神經受損後，醫師記錄到唇舌功能變弱。
A labioglossal exercise can improve coordination between the lips and tongue. 唇舌訓練有助於改善嘴唇與舌頭的協調。

meaning: 唇舌喉的；與嘴唇、舌頭及喉部有關的
sentences: The report describes a rare labioglossolaryngeal paralysis after surgery. 報告描述了一種術後罕見的唇舌喉麻痺。
Therapy focused on restoring labioglossolaryngeal control during speech. 治療重點放在恢復說話時的唇舌喉控制。

meaning: 唇舌咽的；與嘴唇、舌頭及咽部有關的
sentences: The patient showed labioglossopharyngeal weakness when swallowing water. 病人在吞水時出現唇舌咽部無力的現象。
The specialist tested the labioglossopharyngeal muscles during the exam. 專科醫師在檢查時測試了唇舌咽相關肌群。

meaning: 唇動記錄器；記錄嘴唇動作的儀器
sentences: The lab used a labiograph to study how singers shape vowels. 實驗室使用唇動記錄器來研究歌手如何塑造母音。
With the labiograph attached, the students could see their lip movements on screen. 裝上唇動記錄器後，學生可以在螢幕上看到自己的嘴唇動作。

meaning: 唇喉的；在喉部發出並受嘴唇形狀影響的
sentences: The old grammar book grouped the sound with other labioguttural consonants. 那本老語法書把那個聲音歸入其他唇喉音之中。
He practiced the labioguttural articulation slowly in front of a mirror. 他對著鏡子慢慢練習那個唇喉發音。
The patient underwent an exam to check for labiolingual issues. 患者接受了檢查，以確認是否存在 labiolingual 的問題。
Doctors noted several labiolingual characteristics during the procedure. 醫生在手術過程中注意到了幾項 labiolingual 的特徵。
The scientist studied the function of the labiomancy. 科學家研究了 labiomancy 的功能。
Detailed observations of the labiomancy were recorded. 記錄了對 labiomancy 的詳細觀察。
The clinician used labiomental to describe the feature in the exam notes. 臨床說明會用這個詞來描述相關的身體結構或狀態。
The diagram highlights a labiomental structure near the front of the mouth. 圖解也可能用這個詞標示相應的部位。

meaning: 唇部和鼻部；涉及上唇和鼻子，或同時涉及嘴唇和鼻子。
sentences: The patient underwent an exam to check for labionasal issues. 患者接受了檢查，以確認是否存在 labionasal 的問題。
Doctors noted several labionasal characteristics during the procedure. 醫生在手術過程中注意到了幾項 labionasal 的特徵。
The patient underwent an exam to check for labiopalatal issues. 患者接受了檢查，以確認是否存在 labiopalatal 的問題。
Doctors noted several labiopalatal characteristics during the procedure. 醫生在手術過程中注意到了幾項 labiopalatal 的特徵。

meaning: 使其發音同時涉及嘴唇與另一個發音部位。
sentences: The researcher began to labiopalatalize the sample in the laboratory. 研究人員開始在實驗室中對樣本進行 labiopalatalize 處理。
It is difficult to labiopalatalize the material without specialized tools. 如果沒有專業工具，很難對這種材料進行 labiopalatalize。
The patient underwent an exam to check for labiopalatine issues. 患者接受了檢查，以確認是否存在 labiopalatine 的問題。
Doctors noted several labiopalatine characteristics during the procedure. 醫生在手術過程中注意到了幾項 labiopalatine 的特徵。
The patient underwent an exam to check for labiopharyngeal issues. 患者接受了檢查，以確認是否存在 labiopharyngeal 的問題。
Doctors noted several labiopharyngeal characteristics during the procedure. 醫生在手術過程中注意到了幾項 labiopharyngeal 的特徵。

meaning: 陰唇整形術的替代形式。
sentences: Older sources sometimes write labioplasty as an alternative form of labiaplasty. 較早的資料有時會把這個字當作「陰唇整形術」的另一種寫法。
Editors kept labioplasty in the word bank so readers can recognize that variant spelling. 這筆資料保留下來，是為了讓讀者辨認這種變體拼法。

meaning: 具有唇形的外觀；指某些多瓣花冠。
sentences: The patient underwent an exam to check for labiose issues. 患者接受了檢查，以確認是否存在 labiose 的問題。
Doctors noted several labiose characteristics during the procedure. 醫生在手術過程中注意到了幾項 labiose 的特徵。
The scientist studied the function of the labiotenaculum. 科學家研究了 labiotenaculum 的功能。
Detailed observations of the labiotenaculum were recorded. 記錄了對 labiotenaculum 的詳細觀察。
In phonetics, labiovelar describes something involving co-articulated at the velum and the lips. 在語音學裡，這個詞用來描述這種發音特徵。
Students used labiovelar while describing the sound pattern. 學生在描述這種發音模式時會用到這個詞。

meaning: 前牙位置偏離正常咬合線，朝向嘴唇。
sentences: The doctor explained the role of labioversion during the consultation. 醫師說明時會提到這個部位或概念的作用。
